Multi-class Probabilistic Active Learning¶

 9 import os
10 import numpy as np
11 from matplotlib import pyplot as plt, animation
12 from sklearn.datasets import make_blobs
13
14 from skactiveml.utils import MISSING_LABEL, unlabeled_indices, labeled_indices
15 from skactiveml.visualization import plot_utility, plot_decision_boundary
16
17 from skactiveml.pool import McPAL
18 from skactiveml.classifier import PWC
19
20 random_state = np.random.RandomState(0)
21
22 # Build a dataset.
23 X, y_true = make_blobs(n_samples=100, n_features=2,
24                        centers=[[0, 1], [-3, .5], [-1, -1], [2, 1], [1, -.5]],
25                        cluster_std=.7, random_state=random_state)
26 y_true = y_true % 2
27 y = np.full(shape=y_true.shape, fill_value=MISSING_LABEL)
28
29 # Initialise the classifier.
30 clf = PWC(classes=[0, 1], random_state=random_state)
31 # Initialise the query strategy.
32 qs = McPAL(random_state=random_state)
33 dens_est = clf.fit(X, np.zeros(len(X)))
34 dens = clf.predict_freq(X)[:,0]
35
36 # Preparation for plotting.
37 fig, ax = plt.subplots()
38 feature_bound = [[min(X[:, 0]), min(X[:, 1])], [max(X[:, 0]), max(X[:, 1])]]
39 artists = []
40
41 # The active learning cycle:
42 n_cycles = 25
43 for c in range(n_cycles):
44     # Fit the classifier.
45     clf.fit(X, y)
46
47     # Set X_cand to the unlabeled instances.
48     unlbld_idx = unlabeled_indices(y)
49     X_cand = X[unlbld_idx]
50     X_labeled = X[labeled_indices(y)]
51
52     # Query the next instance/s.
53     query_params = {"clf": clf, "utility_weight": dens[unlbld_idx], "X": X, "y": y}
54     query_idx = unlbld_idx[qs.query(X_cand, **query_params)]
55
56     # Plot the labeled data.
57     coll_old = list(ax.collections)
58     title = ax.text(
59         0.5, 1.05, f"Decision boundry after acquring {c} labels",
60         size=plt.rcParams["axes.titlesize"], ha="center",
61         transform=ax.transAxes
62     )
63     ax = plot_utility(qs, {'clf': clf, 'X': X, 'y': y, 'utility_weight': dens}, X_cand=X, feature_bound=feature_bound, ax=ax)
64     ax.scatter(X[:, 0], X[:, 1], c=y_true, cmap="coolwarm", marker=".", zorder=2)
65     ax.scatter(X_labeled[:, 0], X_labeled[:, 1], c="grey", alpha=.8, marker=".", s=300)
66     ax = plot_decision_boundary(clf, feature_bound, ax=ax)
67
68     coll_new = list(ax.collections)
69     coll_new.append(title)
70     artists.append([x for x in coll_new if (x not in coll_old)])
71
72     # Label the queried instances.
73     y[query_idx] = y_true[query_idx]
74
75 ani = animation.ArtistAnimation(fig, artists, interval=1000, blit=True)

References:

The implementation of this strategy is based on Kottke et al.1.

1

Daniel Kottke, Georg Krempl, Dominik Lang, Johannes Teschner, and Myra Spiliopoulou. Multi-class probabilistic active learning. In Proceedings of the European Conference on Artificial Intelligence, volume 285, 586–594. IOS Press, 2016.
